news.headline: Retired Belgian Diplomat, 93, Faces Trial Over 1961 Killing of Congolese Leader
news.summary: A Brussels court ruled that Étienne Davignon must stand trial for the murder of Patrice Lumumba, the first prime minister of the Democratic Republic of Congo.

news.headline: International shipping 'chaos' as Strait of Hormuz closure sends ripple effects across the globe
news.summary: Around 90% of global goods are transported by sea. And while just approximately 5% of that travels directly through the Strait of Hormuz, Iran's effective closure of the key passage is having a ripple effect, disrupting trade routes world wide. FRANCE 24's Sharon Gaffney speaks with Ebru Surucu-Balc

news.headline: Qatar orders departure of two Iranian diplomats over gas facility attack
news.summary: Qatar's foreign ministry on Wednesday ordered Iran's military and security attaches along with their staff to leave the country within 24 hours, following an attack on its massive natural gas facility. FRANCE 24's Hoda Abdel-Hamid reports from Doha.
